scripts.build: npm run brand:sync && tsc -b && npm --workspace truss-harness-vscode run bundle
scripts.web:dev: npm run brand:sync && npm --workspace @truss-harness/branding run build && npm --workspace @truss-harness/docs run dev
scripts.web:build: npm run brand:sync && npm --workspace @truss-harness/branding run build && npm --workspace @truss-harness/docs run build
scripts.release:check: npm run build:fresh && npm test && npm run docs:build:isolated && npm run package:npm && npm run package:vscode
scripts.docs:dev: npm run brand:sync && npm --workspace @truss-harness/branding run build && npm --workspace @truss-harness/docs run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run brand:sync && npm --workspace @truss-harness/branding run build && npm --workspace @truss-harness/docs run build
scripts.docs:build:isolated: npm run brand:sync && npm --workspace @truss-harness/branding run build && node scripts/build-docs-isolated.mjs
